pg57-p1-s1:
Save for a few brief moments of temptation the thought of drink has never returned; and at such times a great revulsion
has risen up in him.
pg57-p1-s2: Seemingly he could not drink even if he would.
pg57-p1:
Save for a few brief moments of temptation the thought of drink has never returned; and at such times a great revulsion
has risen up in him. Seemingly he could not drink even if he would. God had restored his sanity.
pg57-p2-s1: What is this but a miracle of healing?
pg57-p2-s3: Circumstances made him willing to believe.
pg57-p2-s4:
He humbly
offered himself to his Maker - then he knew.
pg57-p2:
What is this but a miracle of healing? Yet its elements are simple. Circumstances made him willing to believe. He humbly
offered himself to his Maker - then he knew.
pg57-p3-s1: Even so has God restored us all to our right minds.
pg57-p3-s2: To this man, the revelation was sudden.
pg57-p3-s3:
Some of us grow into it more
slowly.
pg57-p3-s4: But He has come to all who have honestly sought Him.
pg57-p3:
Even so has God restored us all to our right minds. To this man, the revelation was sudden. Some of us grow into it more
slowly. But He has come to all who have honestly sought Him.
pg57-p4-s1: When we drew near to Him He disclosed Himself to us!
pg57-p4: When we drew near to Him He disclosed Himself to us!
